records.ety: [NL. Named after M. de Poinci, a governor of the French West Indies.]

defs: A prickly tropical shrub (Cæsalpinia, formerly Poinciana, pulcherrima), with bipinnate leaves, and racemes of showy orange-red flowers with long crimson filaments.
notes: ☞ The genus Poinciana is kept up for three trees of Eastern Africa, the Mascarene Islands, and India.
